entry.title: [RTHINK] Will the US use nukes to destroy Iran's underground nuclear facilities? #iran #nuclear #trump #usa
entry.summary:
In this episode of Radical Thinker, we break down the massive escalation in the Middle East. Last night, the US launched heavy strikes against 11 key locations in Iran. In response, Iran unleashed a continuous 36-hour drone and missile barrage targeting US bases and assets in the region, destroying radars, satellite communication systems, and Patriot missile batteries.
Meanwhile, following a meeting with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun, Donald Trump said that the US is prepared to strike "Pickaxe Mountain", an underground facility where is believed that Iran has relocated its advanced centrifuges and highly enriched uranium stockpile following the 12-Day War in June 2026.
Will the US resort to using low-yield nuclear weapons to destroy Iran's underground nuclear facilities? Find out in this episode of Radical Thinker!
Make sure to like, subscribe, and turn on notifications so you never miss an update.
If you enjoy my content and want to support me, you can do it here: patreon.com/RadicalThinkerRT
You can also follow me on X: https://x.com/RadicalThinker5
#iran #iranwar #nuclear #trump #usa #gulf #straitofhormuz #persiangulf #Jordan #kuwait #bahrain #war #Israel #iranisraelwar #lebanon
entry.content:
In this episode of Radical Thinker, we break down the massive escalation in the Middle East. Last night, the US launched heavy strikes against 11 key locations in Iran. In response, Iran unleashed a continuous 36-hour drone and missile barrage targeting US bases and assets in the region, destroying radars, satellite communication systems, and Patriot missile batteries.

Meanwhile, following a meeting with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun, Donald Trump said that the US is prepared to strike "Pickaxe Mountain", an underground facility where is believed that Iran has relocated its advanced centrifuges and highly enriched uranium stockpile following the 12-Day War in June 2026.

Will the US resort to using low-yield nuclear weapons to destroy Iran's underground nuclear facilities? Find out in this episode of Radical Thinker!

Make sure to like, subscribe, and turn on notifications so you never miss an update.

If you enjoy my content and want to support me, you can do it here: patreon.com/RadicalThinkerRT

You can also follow me on X: https://x.com/RadicalThinker5

#iran #iranwar #nuclear #trump #usa #gulf #straitofhormuz #persiangulf #Jordan #kuwait #bahrain #war #Israel #iranisraelwar #lebanon

entry.title: [RTHINK] Iranian Special Forces cross into Iraq, and prepare to take over US bases in the Gulf! #iran #war
entry.summary:
During the recent escalation with the United States, Iran deployed new missiles and hybrid warheads, striking American bases in Bahrain, Kuwait, and Jordan. CENTCOM has confirmed four U.S. soldiers dead, one missing, and fifteen wounded in the latest exchange of fire.
Iran also hit King Hussein International Airport in Aqaba, Jordan, destroying several U.S. aircraft. In Kuwait, Iranian forces struck desalination and electricity facilities in retaliation for U.S. strikes on Iranian territory.
Meanwhile, Iran's 65th NOHED Airborne Special Forces Brigade crossed the border into Iraqi Kurdistan, targeting leaders of U.S.- and Israeli-backed Kurdish groups. According to an Iranian journalist, Tehran is now considering using ground troops to seize U.S. bases in Kuwait.
Find out more about the latest developments in the Middle East by watching this episode of Radical Thinker!
If you enjoy my content and want to support me, you can do it here: patreon.com/RadicalThinkerRT
You can also follow me on X: https://x.com/RadicalThinker5
#MiddleEast #Geopolitics #RadicalThinker #iran #iranwar #trump #usa #kuwait #jordan #iraq #persiangulf #strait of hormuz #aqaba #kurdistan #iranisraelwar #israel
entry.content:
During the recent escalation with the United States, Iran deployed new missiles and hybrid warheads, striking American bases in Bahrain, Kuwait, and Jordan. CENTCOM has confirmed four U.S. soldiers dead, one missing, and fifteen wounded in the latest exchange of fire.

Iran also hit King Hussein International Airport in Aqaba, Jordan, destroying several U.S. aircraft. In Kuwait, Iranian forces struck desalination and electricity facilities in retaliation for U.S. strikes on Iranian territory.

Meanwhile, Iran's 65th NOHED Airborne Special Forces Brigade crossed the border into Iraqi Kurdistan, targeting leaders of U.S.- and Israeli-backed Kurdish groups. According to an Iranian journalist, Tehran is now considering using ground troops to seize U.S. bases in Kuwait.

Find out more about the latest developments in the Middle East by watching this episode of Radical Thinker!

If you enjoy my content and want to support me, you can do it here: patreon.com/RadicalThinkerRT

You can also follow me on X: https://x.com/RadicalThinker5

#MiddleEast #Geopolitics #RadicalThinker #iran #iranwar #trump #usa #kuwait #jordan #iraq #persiangulf #strait of hormuz #aqaba #kurdistan #iranisraelwar #israel

entry.title: [RTHINK] The US hits children's cancer hospital in Iran, prepares for ground invasion! #Iran #trump #iranwar
entry.summary:
The United States has yet again committed a disgusting war crime by hitting a children's cancer hospital in Ahwaz, Iran. During nighttime strikes, the U.S. military attacked and destroyed six Iranian bridges, killing 7 and injuring 9 people. In retaliation, Iran responded by attacking U.S. assets in Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan, Oman, and the Kurdistan Region of Iraq.
Meanwhile, White House spokesperson Karoline Leavitt shamelessly lies once again, claiming that Iran bombed the school in Minab, although irrefutable evidence points to multiple Tomahawk missile strikes conducted by the U.S. military on the first day of its war of aggression against Iran, which lead to the killing of 168 schoolgirls and 26 teachers.
In other developments, Donald Trump is pushing hard for Syria to enter Lebanon and fight Hezbollah.
👇 Subscribe to Radical Thinker for more unfiltered geopolitical analysis and leave your thoughts in the comments below!
If you enjoy my content and want to support me, you can do it here: patreon.com/RadicalThinkerRT
You can also follow me on X: https://x.com/RadicalThinker5
#RadicalThinker #Geopolitics #USIranConflict #MiddleEastNews #ForeignPolicy #globalnews #iran #iranisraelwar #trump #usa #straitofhormuz #persiangulf #israel #syria
entry.content:
The United States has yet again committed a disgusting war crime by hitting a children's cancer hospital in Ahwaz, Iran. During nighttime strikes, the U.S. military attacked and destroyed six Iranian bridges, killing 7 and injuring 9 people. In retaliation, Iran responded by attacking U.S. assets in Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan, Oman, and the Kurdistan Region of Iraq.

Meanwhile, White House spokesperson Karoline Leavitt shamelessly lies once again, claiming that Iran bombed the school in Minab, although irrefutable evidence points to multiple Tomahawk missile strikes conducted by the U.S. military on the first day of its war of aggression against Iran, which lead to the killing of 168 schoolgirls and 26 teachers.

In other developments, Donald Trump is pushing hard for Syria to enter Lebanon and fight Hezbollah.

👇 Subscribe to Radical Thinker for more unfiltered geopolitical analysis and leave your thoughts in the comments below!

If you enjoy my content and want to support me, you can do it here: patreon.com/RadicalThinkerRT

entry.title: [RTHINK] Lindsey Graham is in Hell, the US and Iran are exchanging blows...again! #lindseygraham #iran #trump
entry.summary:
Senator Lindsey Graham—one of the worst warmongers in American politics and a corrupt politician who repeatedly betrayed his country for Israel—has passed away under mysterious circumstances at the age of 71.
In this episode of Radical Thinker, we break down his evil legacy. We examine his extensive record, from his backing of the genocide in Gaza to his relentless cheerleading for the illegal US and Israeli war of aggression against the Islamic Republic of Iran.
We also bring you the latest updates on the escalating regional conflict: Clashes in the Gulf: 🔴 Over the past few days, US occupation forces have exchanged heavy blows with the Iranian armed forces during a failed attempt to seize control of the Strait of Hormuz.
🔴 Turmoil in Iran: The Pezeshkian administration is under intense fire over the failure of recent negotiations. The nephew of Ruhollah Khomeini, the founder of the Islamic Republic, has openly criticized those pushing for diplomacy.
🔴 Calls for Retaliation: The current Supreme Leader of Iran is demanding severe revenge against those responsible for the assassination of former Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.
Watch the full episode to uncover the truth behind the headlines, and find out more about what this means for the future of the region!
👇 Subscribe to Radical Thinker for more unfiltered geopolitical analysis and leave your thoughts in the comments below!
#lindseygraham #trump #iran #iranwar #khomeini #pezeshkian #khamenei #mojtabakhamenei #mojtaba #
If you enjoy my content and want to support me, you can do it here: patreon.com/RadicalThinkerRT
You can also follow me on X: https://x.com/RadicalThinker5
entry.content:
Senator Lindsey Graham—one of the worst warmongers in American politics and a corrupt politician who repeatedly betrayed his country for Israel—has passed away under mysterious circumstances at the age of 71.

In this episode of Radical Thinker, we break down his evil legacy. We examine his extensive record, from his backing of the genocide in Gaza to his relentless cheerleading for the illegal US and Israeli war of aggression against the Islamic Republic of Iran.

We also bring you the latest updates on the escalating regional conflict:
Clashes in the Gulf:
🔴 Over the past few days, US occupation forces have exchanged heavy blows with the Iranian armed forces during a failed attempt to seize control of the Strait of Hormuz.

🔴 Turmoil in Iran: The Pezeshkian administration is under intense fire over the failure of recent negotiations. The nephew of Ruhollah Khomeini, the founder of the Islamic Republic, has openly criticized those pushing for diplomacy.

🔴 Calls for Retaliation: The current Supreme Leader of Iran is demanding severe revenge against those responsible for the assassination of former Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.

Watch the full episode to uncover the truth behind the headlines, and find out more about what this means for the future of the region!

👇 Subscribe to Radical Thinker for more unfiltered geopolitical analysis and leave your thoughts in the comments below!

#lindseygraham #trump #iran #iranwar #khomeini #pezeshkian #khamenei #mojtabakhamenei #mojtaba #

entry.title: [RTHINK] How the US Murdered International Football, and Bombed Iran Again #worldcup #egypt #trump #argentina
entry.summary:
🚨 Is the 2026 World Cup the most RIGGED tournament in football history? 🚨
From secret backroom deals to blatant political interference, the shocking truth behind this year's World Cup might be wilder than anything we've seen on the pitch! 🤯 In this video, we dive deep into the massive controversies surrounding the 2026 FIFA World Cup:
The FIFA Hijacking: How the United States bypassed international sports rules to seize control of the 2026 tournament.
Targeting Teams: The intense geopolitical pressure and persecution faced by national teams like Iran and Egypt.
The Messi Coronation: Are football authorities paving a smooth path for Lionel Messi and Argentina to take home a rigged trophy? 🏆👀
The Infantino-Trump Connection: How current FIFA President Gianni Infantino rose to power under US pressure, and the explosive claims made by former FIFA chief Sepp Blatter regarding abuses at this highly controversial international event.
Is the 2026 World Cup officially the worst, most failed edition of the competition ever—or is it just business as usual for FIFA? 🤔
👇 WE WANT TO HEAR FROM YOU! Is this tournament completely rigged, or are fans overreacting?
Make sure to LIKE, SUBSCRIBE, and hit that NOTIFICATION BELL! 🔔
#WorldCup2026 #FIFA #Messi #FootballControversy #Trump #infantino #trump #worldcup #egypt #argentina #iran #infantino #fifa #corruptionexposed #iran #israel #iranwar #usa #irannews #iranisraelwar #lebanon #persiangulf #straitofhormuz
entry.content:
🚨 Is the 2026 World Cup the most RIGGED tournament in football history? 🚨

From secret backroom deals to blatant political interference, the shocking truth behind this year's World Cup might be wilder than anything we've seen on the pitch! 🤯
In this video, we dive deep into the massive controversies surrounding the 2026 FIFA World Cup:

The FIFA Hijacking: How the United States bypassed international sports rules to seize control of the 2026 tournament.

Targeting Teams: The intense geopolitical pressure and persecution faced by national teams like Iran and Egypt.

The Messi Coronation: Are football authorities paving a smooth path for Lionel Messi and Argentina to take home a rigged trophy? 🏆👀

The Infantino-Trump Connection: How current FIFA President Gianni Infantino rose to power under US pressure, and the explosive claims made by former FIFA chief Sepp Blatter regarding abuses at this highly controversial international event.

Is the 2026 World Cup officially the worst, most failed edition of the competition ever—or is it just business as usual for FIFA? 🤔

👇 WE WANT TO HEAR FROM YOU! Is this tournament completely rigged, or are fans overreacting?

Make sure to LIKE, SUBSCRIBE, and hit that NOTIFICATION BELL! 🔔

#WorldCup2026 #FIFA #Messi #FootballControversy #Trump #infantino
#trump #worldcup #egypt #argentina #iran #infantino #fifa #corruptionexposed #iran #israel #iranwar #usa #irannews #iranisraelwar #lebanon #persiangulf #straitofhormuz

entry.title: [RTHINK] Terror Bomb attacks in Damascus, during Macron's visit to Syria. Who is behind it? #macron #syria
entry.summary:
Explosions rock Damascus during French President Emmanuel Macron's high-profile visit to Syria. What is the real purpose of Macron's meetings with Syria's interim leader, Ahmad al-Sharaa (formerly known as Abu Mohammed al-Jolani)? Is France seeking to support Syria's reconstruction after years of devastating conflict, or is it pursuing renewed influence in a country it once controlled during the colonial era?
Who is responsible for the bomb blasts, and what objectives might these attacks serve? Are they intended to derail diplomatic efforts, fuel instability, or send a broader political message?
In today's episode of Radical Thinker, we examine the latest developments, the geopolitical stakes, and the competing narratives surrounding Macron's visit and the violence that unfolded in Damascus.
Watch now and share your thoughts in the comments. Don't forget to like, subscribe, and turn on notifications for more in-depth geopolitical analysis.
#syria #macron #bomb #terrorattack #jolani #damascus #iran #trump #iranwar #israel #usa #irannews #iranisraelwar #persiangulf #lebanon #straitofhormuz
entry.content:
Explosions rock Damascus during French President Emmanuel Macron's high-profile visit to Syria. What is the real purpose of Macron's meetings with Syria's interim leader, Ahmad al-Sharaa (formerly known as Abu Mohammed al-Jolani)? Is France seeking to support Syria's reconstruction after years of devastating conflict, or is it pursuing renewed influence in a country it once controlled during the colonial era?

Who is responsible for the bomb blasts, and what objectives might these attacks serve? Are they intended to derail diplomatic efforts, fuel instability, or send a broader political message?

In today's episode of Radical Thinker, we examine the latest developments, the geopolitical stakes, and the competing narratives surrounding Macron's visit and the violence that unfolded in Damascus.

Watch now and share your thoughts in the comments. Don't forget to like, subscribe, and turn on notifications for more in-depth geopolitical analysis.

#syria #macron #bomb #terrorattack #jolani #damascus #iran #trump #iranwar #israel #usa #irannews #iranisraelwar #persiangulf #lebanon #straitofhormuz

entry.title: [RTHINK] Will Israel attack the funeral procession of the late Supreme Leader of Iran, Ali Khamenei? #iran
entry.summary:
As the terms of the Memorandum of Understanding signed by Iran and the US are getting trampled by the US almost on a daily basis, the great funeral of the late Supreme Leader of Iran, Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei will begin this weekend. Will Israel try to attack the funeral, as it tried to do with the funerals of the former Secretary General of the Lebanese Resistance in Beirut? The US uses its pressure to force the Iraqi government to go against the Shia pro-Iran resistance forces and disarm them. As the tensions are rising, find out what can happen from this episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #khamenei #khameneifuneral #khameneideath #khamenei_ir #trump #iranwar #israel #usa #iranisraelwar #irannews #persiangulf #lebanon #straitofhormuz #iraq #resistance
entry.content:
As the terms of the Memorandum of Understanding signed by Iran and the US are getting trampled by the US almost on a daily basis, the great funeral of the late Supreme Leader of Iran, Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei will begin this weekend. Will Israel try to attack the funeral, as it tried to do with the funerals of the former Secretary General of the Lebanese Resistance in Beirut? The US uses its pressure to force the Iraqi government to go against the Shia pro-Iran resistance forces and disarm them. As the tensions are rising, find out what can happen from this episode of Radical Thinker!

entry.title: [RTHINK] The MoU Scam - US and Israel move to conquer Lebanon, Iran in turmoil #iran #iranwar #lebanon #usa
entry.summary:
While Iran keeps talking about the Memorandum of Understanding, the US and Israel are busy violating it. With the active support of traitors inside the Lebanese State, Israel obtained green light to continue to occupy South Lebanon. The US is preparing to deploy ground forces to help the Lebanese army in crushing the Lebanese resistance forces. Find out more from this episode of Radical Thinker.
If you want to support my work patreon.com/RadicalThinkerRT
#iran #iranisraelwar #iranwar #usa #irannews #israel #persiangulf #straitofhormuz #lebanon

entry.title: [RTHINK] Trump violates the MoU with Iran, Al-Jolani says he cares for the Shias of Lebanon #iran #trump #usa
entry.summary:
Donald Trump is already violating the terms agreed by the US and Iran in the Memorandum of Understanding, by adding new conditions for the release of Iranian frozen assets, only if Iran will agree to use them to buy agricultural products from American farmers. Trump is imposing AEIA inspections on Iranian nuclear sites, although the nuclear file has not been negotiated yet in the Memorandum of Understanding. Ahmad al-Sharaa al-Jolani, the so-called president of Syria and the former leader of Jabhat al Nusra, says he cares for the Shias of Lebanon and that not all Lebanese Shias are supporters of Hezbollah. Is he preparing the ground for a Syrian involvement in Lebanon, in support of Israel? Find out more from this episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #iranwar #trump #irannews #iranisraelwar #usa #israel #persiangulf #straitofhormuz #lebanon #syria #radicalthinker
entry.content:
Donald Trump is already violating the terms agreed by the US and Iran in the Memorandum of Understanding, by adding new conditions for the release of Iranian frozen assets, only if Iran will agree to use them to buy agricultural products from American farmers. Trump is imposing AEIA inspections on Iranian nuclear sites, although the nuclear file has not been negotiated yet in the Memorandum of Understanding. Ahmad al-Sharaa al-Jolani, the so-called president of Syria and the former leader of Jabhat al Nusra, says he cares for the Shias of Lebanon and that not all Lebanese Shias are supporters of Hezbollah. Is he preparing the ground for a Syrian involvement in Lebanon, in support of Israel? Find out more from this episode of Radical Thinker!

#iran #iranwar #trump #irannews #iranisraelwar #usa #israel #persiangulf #straitofhormuz #lebanon #syria #radicalthinker

entry.title: [RTHINK] US capitulation or tactical deception? Trump doesn't care about the dead girls in Minab #iran #trump
entry.summary:
The Memorandum of Understanding between Iran and the United States has been made public and it uncovers a lot of concessions that the Americans did. Is this MoU a capitulation of the United States in front of the Islamic Republic or just a new tactic of Trump and his administration to fool the Iranians and prepare the ground for new hostilities. When asked about the massacre in Minab, where the US bombed and killed over 160 Iranian school girls, Donald Trump minimised the American war crime and claimed that "wars are nasty". Find out more in today's episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #iranwar #trump #iranisraelwar #irannews #usa #persiangulf #israel #straitofhormuz #lebanon
Support Radical Thinker: https://patreon.com/RadicalThinkerRT?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink

When asked about the massacre in Minab, where the US bombed and killed over 160 Iranian school girls, Donald Trump minimised the American war crime and claimed that "wars are nasty". entry.title: [RTHINK] Iran & the US claim to be very close to an agreement, Israel says it will not abide by it #iran #usa
entry.summary:
After Iran threatened to hit Israel hard for disrupting once again the ceasefire by targeting the suburbs of Beirut, the US made more concessions, and announced the end of the naval blockage and the withdrawal of Israeli forces from the areas occupied in South Lebanon. The Israelis announced that they are not part of the deal, and that they don't intend to leave from the occupied territories in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria. The fragile memorandum of understanding is almost dead on arrival, as long as the US doesn't force Israel to back down. Find out more from this episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #iranwar #trump #iranisraelwar #irannews #usa #persiangulf #israel
entry.content:
After Iran threatened to hit Israel hard for disrupting once again the ceasefire by targeting the suburbs of Beirut, the US made more concessions, and announced the end of the naval blockage and the withdrawal of Israeli forces from the areas occupied in South Lebanon. The Israelis announced that they are not part of the deal, and that they don't intend to leave from the occupied territories in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria. The fragile memorandum of understanding is almost dead on arrival, as long as the US doesn't force Israel to back down. Find out more from this episode of Radical Thinker!

#iran #iranwar #trump #iranisraelwar #irannews #usa #persiangulf #israel

entry.title: [RTHINK] IRAN & US GET CLOSER TO A DEAL, OMAN STANDS STRONG, ISRAEL CAUGHT INTERFERING IN FRENCH ELECTIONS
entry.summary:
Iran and the United States seem to get closer to a Memorandum of Understanding, which would pave the way for the negotiation of a permanent deal. What are the 14 points present in the MoU, why Oman strands strong in front of American threats, and how Israel was caught interfering in French elections. Find out from this episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #iranwar #trump #iranisraelwar #irannews #usa #persiangulf #israel #straitofhormuz #lebanon #france #oman

entry.title: [RTHINK] Donald Trump claims it has reached a deal with Iran, while pushing Syria to attack Hezbollah #trump
entry.summary:
Donald Trump is yet again claiming that he reached a deal with Iran, and that Iran will accept all the US demands and in essence capitulate. Iran denies that a deal has been reached for now, while Trump is inviting Ahmed al Sharaa al Joulani, the Syrian president, to White House, to discuss most probably a way for Syria to open a new front in Lebanon against Hezbollah. Find out more from this episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #iranwar #iranisraelwar #irannews #usa #persiangulf #israel #straitofhormuz #lebanon #syria

entry.title: [RTHINK] Iran hits US bases in retaliation for the American aggression. Will Iran take over Bahrain? #iran
entry.summary:
Donald Trump ordered US strikes against Iran, but the Islamic Republic of Iran replied with ballistic missile and drone launches against US bases in Bahrain, Kuwait and Jordan. Iranian officials send signals that Iran might make the decision to take over Bahrain. What will happen? Find out from this episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #iranwar #iranisraelwar #trump #irannews #usa #persiangulf #israel #straitofhormuz #lebanon #bahrain #kuwait #jordan
entry.content:
Donald Trump ordered US strikes against Iran, but the Islamic Republic of Iran replied with ballistic missile and drone launches against US bases in Bahrain, Kuwait and Jordan. Iranian officials send signals that Iran might make the decision to take over Bahrain. What will happen? Find out from this episode of Radical Thinker!

#iran #iranwar #iranisraelwar #trump #irannews #usa #persiangulf #israel #straitofhormuz #lebanon #bahrain #kuwait #jordan

entry.title: [RTHINK] Iran and the US exchange blows, while Israel exposes the traitors inside the Lebanese state #iran
entry.summary:
Iran and the US exchanged fire again, after an US Apache helicopter was downed over the Strait of Hormuz by the IRGC navy. The US responded with retaliatory strikes but found itself hit by Iran, who launched ballistic missiles and drones against the American bases in Jordan, Kuwait and Bahrain. These skirmishes show that the end of the conflict is far away, and an agreement is far from happening anytime soon. In the meantime, the Israeli press is exposing the traitors inside the Lebanese state, those working of the interests of the US and of Israel. Find out more about it from this episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #iranwar #iranisraelwar #trump #irannews #usa #persiangulf #israel #straitofhormuz #lebanon
entry.content:
Iran and the US exchanged fire again, after an US Apache helicopter was downed over the Strait of Hormuz by the IRGC navy. The US responded with retaliatory strikes but found itself hit by Iran, who launched ballistic missiles and drones against the American bases in Jordan, Kuwait and Bahrain. These skirmishes show that the end of the conflict is far away, and an agreement is far from happening anytime soon. In the meantime, the Israeli press is exposing the traitors inside the Lebanese state, those working of the interests of the US and of Israel. entry.title: [RTHINK] Iran strikes Israel, the War Resumes, IRAN WAR - DAY 101 #iran #Israel #iranwar #lebanon #trump
entry.summary:
Iran hit various targets inside Israel after the IDF unwisely decided to strike the suburbs of Beirut. Previously, the Iranian foreign minister warned that if the IDF will strike Beirut, then Iran will answer and hit Israel. Are these the beginning ours of the second phase of the war, or is just an escalatory flare which will calm down pretty fast? Find out from today's episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #Israel #iranwar #lebanon #trump #radicalthinker #iranisraelwar #irannews #usa #persiangulf #straitofhormuz #israel #yemen

entry.title: [RTHINK] Lebanon's puppet government capitulates in front of Israel, IRAN WAR - DAY 97 #lebanon #iran #israel
entry.summary:
Under heavy American pressure, the Lebanese puppet government has agreed to every Israeli demand, betraying the people from the South of Lebanon. How will this agreement reached in Washington, affect the Lebanese resistance and their struggle against the Israeli invasion of their lands. Find out from this episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #lebanon #Israel #lebanonisrael #iranwar #trump #irannews #podcast #straitofhormuz #persiangulf #iranisraelwar
entry.content:
Under heavy American pressure, the Lebanese puppet government has agreed to every Israeli demand, betraying the people from the South of Lebanon. How will this agreement reached in Washington, affect the Lebanese resistance and their struggle against the Israeli invasion of their lands. Find out from this episode of Radical Thinker!

#iran #lebanon #Israel #lebanonisrael #iranwar #trump #irannews #podcast #straitofhormuz #persiangulf #iranisraelwar

entry.title: [RTHINK] Donald Trump threatens to blow up Oman, and why Iran should boycott the FIFA World Cup #worldcup
entry.summary:
Donald Trump has threatened to blow up the Sultanate of Oman, if it moves further with the plan of controlling the Strait of Hormuz together with Iran. Trump tries to force Oman to back down, although even if this happens, Iran will still control by itself the Strait of Hormuz. In this episode I also discuss why Iran should boycott the FIFA World Cup, co-hosted by the US, and why many other countries, including Russia and China should also boycott this tournament.
#iran #iranwar #oman #trump #worldcup #boycott #iranisraelwar #irannews #radicalthinker #geopolitics
entry.content:
Donald Trump has threatened to blow up the Sultanate of Oman, if it moves further with the plan of controlling the Strait of Hormuz together with Iran. Trump tries to force Oman to back down, although even if this happens, Iran will still control by itself the Strait of Hormuz. In this episode I also discuss why Iran should boycott the FIFA World Cup, co-hosted by the US, and why many other countries, including Russia and China should also boycott this tournament.

#iran #iranwar #oman #trump #worldcup #boycott #iranisraelwar #irannews #radicalthinker #geopolitics

entry.title: [RTHINK] The Samson Option and why Iran and the US might never reach a deal, IRAN WAR - DAY 87 #iran #israel
entry.summary:
In this new episode of Radical Thinker, we will discuss the Israeli nuclear strategy, called the Samson Option and why Israel's influence in the American political spectrum might prevent the US and Iran from ever reaching a deal.
#iran #iranwar #iranisraelwar #irannews #trump #usa #persiangulf #podcast #lebanon #straitofhormuz

entry.title: [RTHINK] Israel tortures the Global Sumud Flotilla Activists, IRAN WAR - DAY 84 #Israel #palestine #gaza
entry.summary:
Israel once again shows that it can detain, torture, humiliate and mistreat not only the Palestinians but also citizens from all over the world, with impunity, and even brags about it, through it's interior minister, Itamar Ben-Gvir. Find out about the global reaction to the latest act of torture and mistreatment committed by Israel against the Global Sumud Flotilla activists.
#Israel #palestine #gaza #gazaflotilla #iran #sumudflotilla

entry.title: [RTHINK] REFUTING WILLIAM VAN WAGENEN ON IRAN - PART 1 #iran #iranwar #trump #iranisraelwar #usa #irannews
entry.summary:
In this episode of Radical Thinker I am refuting the claims made by the journalist William Van Wagenen about Iran, in an episode of the Syriana Analysis YouTube Geopolitical show by Kevork Almassion.
Van Wagenen claims that the Islamic Revolution of 1979 was nothing but a US, British and Israeli color backed revolution, and that Iran is not really pushing back against the US and Israeli agendas in the Middle East, but on contrary is a puppet who plays a dirty game.
The Syriana Analysis episode on which William Van Wagenen appeared: https://youtu.be/zvxWz35mugw
In the next days a second part of this Radical Thinker Debunking series, refuting Van Wagenen's claims about Iran, will be posted. Stay tuned!
#iran #iranwar #trump #iranisraelwar #usa #irannews #syrianaanalysis #kevorkalmassian #williamvanwagenen #syria #persiangulf #straitofhormuz #islamic revolution
entry.content:
In this episode of Radical Thinker I am refuting the claims made by the journalist William Van Wagenen about Iran, in an episode of the Syriana Analysis YouTube Geopolitical show by Kevork Almassion.

Van Wagenen claims that the Islamic Revolution of 1979 was nothing but a US, British and Israeli color backed revolution, and that Iran is not really pushing back against the US and Israeli agendas in the Middle East, but on contrary is a puppet who plays a dirty game.

The Syriana Analysis episode on which William Van Wagenen appeared:
https://youtu.be/zvxWz35mugw

In the next days a second part of this Radical Thinker Debunking series, refuting Van Wagenen's claims about Iran, will be posted. Stay tuned!

#iran #iranwar #trump #iranisraelwar #usa #irannews #syrianaanalysis #kevorkalmassian #williamvanwagenen #syria #persiangulf #straitofhormuz #islamic revolution

entry.title: [RTHINK] Trump goes to China, Israel and the UAE become best friends, IRAN WAR - DAY 76 #iran #china #trump
entry.summary:
Donald Trump, the US president visits China, while Israel admits that Prime Minister Netanyahu visited the United Arab Emirates during the war with Iran. More about US and Chinese relations and about the emerging of a new multipolar world, in this episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #iranwar #china #trump #usa #israel #uae
entry.content:
Donald Trump, the US president visits China, while Israel admits that Prime Minister Netanyahu visited the United Arab Emirates during the war with Iran. More about US and Chinese relations and about the emerging of a new multipolar world, in this episode of Radical Thinker!

#iran #iranwar #china #trump #usa #israel #uae

entry.title: [RTHINK] Trump rejects Iran's counter proposal, Netanyahu wants more war, IRAN WAR - DAY 72 #iran #trump #usa
entry.summary:
Donald Trump has rejected the Iranian counter proposal. Iran refuses to hand over the enriched uranium stockpile, and demands an end of the war won all fronts and the removal of the naval blockade and sanctions. Benjamin Netanyahu wants the US to wage more war on Iran, and is lobbying President Donald Trump to restart the hostilities. Find out more in today's episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #iranwar #iranisraelwar #trump #netanyahu #straitofhormuz #persiangulf #analysis #podcast #irannews #geopolitics
entry.content:
Donald Trump has rejected the Iranian counter proposal. Iran refuses to hand over the enriched uranium stockpile, and demands an end of the war won all fronts and the removal of the naval blockade and sanctions. Benjamin Netanyahu wants the US to wage more war on Iran, and is lobbying President Donald Trump to restart the hostilities. Find out more in today's episode of Radical Thinker!

#iran #iranwar #iranisraelwar #trump #netanyahu #straitofhormuz #persiangulf #analysis #podcast #irannews #geopolitics

entry.title: [RTHINK] Iran hits US ships in the Strait of Hormuz, the start of the Gulf Cold War #iranwar #iran #eau #usa
entry.summary:
The US attacked Bandar Abbas and the Qeshm Island, forcing Iran to respond by hitting a few US warships which were attempting to enter the Strait of Hormuz. The tensions between the United Arab Emirates and the Islamic Republic of Iran lead to the beginning of a Cold War in the Persian Gulf. One one side are the Arab Gulf Countries, vassals of the US and Israel, and on the other side is Iran, Yemen and the Axis of Resistance. Find out more from this episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #iranwar #iranisraelwar #irannews #trump #eau #emirates #dubai #abudhabi #islamicrepublic #straitofhormuz #persiangulf
entry.content:
The US attacked Bandar Abbas and the Qeshm Island, forcing Iran to respond by hitting a few US warships which were attempting to enter the Strait of Hormuz. The tensions between the United Arab Emirates and the Islamic Republic of Iran lead to the beginning of a Cold War in the Persian Gulf. One one side are the Arab Gulf Countries, vassals of the US and Israel, and on the other side is Iran, Yemen and the Axis of Resistance. Find out more from this episode of Radical Thinker!

#iran #iranwar #iranisraelwar #irannews #trump #eau #emirates #dubai #abudhabi #islamicrepublic #straitofhormuz #persiangulf

entry.title: [RTHINK] How the West destroyed Africa and the Middle East, and the truth about Islamic Conquests #iran
entry.summary:
Trump has backed down from his attempt to open the Strait of Hormuz during the so-called Project Freedom, after Iran fired directly at US navy ships in the Persian Gulf. In this episode we answer to one of our viewers comments, regarding Western Colonialism in Africa and in the Middle East, and about the historical reality of the Islamic Era of Conquests. A lot of interesting things to find out about, by watching this episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #iranwar #trump #straitofhormuz #persiangulf #iranisraelwar #britishempire #colonialism #west #islamic #islamicrepublic #islam #islamicempire
entry.content:
Trump has backed down from his attempt to open the Strait of Hormuz during the so-called Project Freedom, after Iran fired directly at US navy ships in the Persian Gulf. In this episode we answer to one of our viewers comments, regarding Western Colonialism in Africa and in the Middle East, and about the historical reality of the Islamic Era of Conquests. A lot of interesting things to find out about, by watching this episode of Radical Thinker!

entry.title: [RTHINK] Iran hits the United Arab Emirates, and breaks the US Naval Blockade #iran #eau #iranwar #dubai
entry.summary:
The Islamic Republic of Iran hit key oil facilities inside the United Arab Emirates, in retaliation for the aggression committed by the EAU during the war when they used Mirage fighter jets and Chinese drones to bomb Iranian territory. Find out why Iran getting a nuclear bomb is a self-fulfilling prophecy. All of this in today's episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #eau #dubai #emirates #iranwar #fujairah #abudhabi #nucleariran #nuclear #navalblockade #iranisraelwar
entry.content:
The Islamic Republic of Iran hit key oil facilities inside the United Arab Emirates, in retaliation for the aggression committed by the EAU during the war when they used Mirage fighter jets and Chinese drones to bomb Iranian territory. Find out why Iran getting a nuclear bomb is a self-fulfilling prophecy. All of this in today's episode of Radical Thinker!

#iran #eau #dubai #emirates #iranwar #fujairah #abudhabi #nucleariran #nuclear #navalblockade #iranisraelwar

entry.title: [RTHINK] The US destroys the world, and accuses Iran of doing it! IRAN WAR - DAY 65 #iran #iranwar #trump
entry.summary:
Donald Trump has accused Iran of destroying the world for the past 47 years, saying Iran needs to pay a heavy price for it. The reality is that for the past 80 years, there is only one country whose actions have destroyed global stability and peace, brought death, destruction and suffering to millions of people all over the world, and the country responsible for all of this is the United States of America. In this episode of Radical Thinker we discuss about American hypocrisy, their continuous hostility towards the Islamic Republic and the Iranian people, as well as the psychosis of the American society and its political spectrum.
#iran #iranwar #trump #straitofhormuz #persiangulf #usa #iranisraelwar
entry.content:
Donald Trump has accused Iran of destroying the world for the past 47 years, saying Iran needs to pay a heavy price for it. The reality is that for the past 80 years, there is only one country whose actions have destroyed global stability and peace, brought death, destruction and suffering to millions of people all over the world, and the country responsible for all of this is the United States of America. In this episode of Radical Thinker we discuss about American hypocrisy, their continuous hostility towards the Islamic Republic and the Iranian people, as well as the psychosis of the American society and its political spectrum.

#iran #iranwar #trump #straitofhormuz #persiangulf #usa #iranisraelwar

entry.title: [RTHINK] Iran Mocks the US Naval Blockade, UAE leaves OPEC #iran #iranwar #trump #eau #opec #irannews #usa
entry.summary:
Iran is mocking the US naval blockade, using its extensive land borders as export paths for oil, while the United Arab Emirates have announced they are leaving OPEC. What this means for the region? Find out from this episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #iranwar #trump #eau #opec #irannews #usa
entry.content:

entry.title: [RTHINK] Iran humiliates the European Union, IRAN WAR - DAY 60 #iran #iranwar #europeanunion #eu #trump
entry.summary:
Ursula Von Der Leyen, the unelected president of the European Union, wants the continuation of the sanctions policy against the Islamic Republic of Iran. The hypocrisy of the European Union, a failed political construct, marred by corruption, incompetence and subservience to the United States, was exposed by Iran's Foreign Minister. Find out more from this episode of Radical Thinker!
#iran #iranwar #europe #europeanunion #iranvsisrael #irannews #trump #podcast

entry.title: [RTHINK] Trump Survives Another Staged Assassination Attempt, IRAN WAR- DAY 58 #iran #trump #iranwar #israel
entry.summary: Donald Trump survives another staged assassination attempt, shifting public attention from the failed negotiations with Iran. Find out how the Islamic Republic successfully bombed US bases using a 60 years old fighter jet, defeating the latest American military technology. #iran #trump #iranwar #Israel #persiangulf #islamicrepublic #straitofhormuz #navalblockade #trumpassassination #trumpassassinationattempt #assasinations
entry.content:
